def positive_feature_flag_checked_via_inline_env_lookup_across_handlers():
    rule_id = "feature_flag_checked_via_inline_env_lookup_across_handlers"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Feature flag checked via repeated inline os.getenv in multiple handlers instead of a single flag service."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
